title: taraxacum pseudophaleratum
intro: Taraxacum pseudophaleratum, also known as the lesser hawk's beard, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion family. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, primarily due to its high content of sesquiterpene lactones and other bioactive compounds, which have been found to exhibit anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Taraxacum pseudophaleratum include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support immune function, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy. Herbal preparations of Taraxacum pseudophaleratum are typically made from its roots and leaves, which can be used to create teas, tinctures, and infusions for medicinal purposes.
